title: improved bamboo
body:
This resource pack adds ridges to bamboo segments and makes the leaves look more bushy. The leaves are much bushier, making them look more like real bamboo. This pack might be lagy older computers.

# - full version has
- the bumps on the stem.
- and has full leaves.


# - and lite version has
- no bumps on the stem.
- and half of the leaves(same as regular bamboo)
